locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

locations.name: 呂宋
locations.summary: 呂宋（他加祿語：Luzon；白話字：Lū-sòng）是菲律賓最大的島，也是世界第15大島，面積109,965平方公里。呂宋島位於菲律賓北部，是首都馬尼拉的所在地。呂宋島在台灣南方，米沙鄢群島北方，南海東方，菲律宾海西方。《劍橋百科》介紹：…

relations.subject: Flame-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines where it is only found in the mountains of Luzon

relations.subject: Flame-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines where it is only found in the mountains of Luzon

relations.subject: Flame-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, poaching for the pet trade and hunting for food. This species was formerly placed in the genus Ptilinopus. It is illegal to hunt, capture or keep flame-breasted fruit-doves under Philippine Law RA 9147.{{Cite web|last=11th Congress|title=Republic Act No
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

It is illegal to hunt, capture or keep flame-breasted fruit-doves under Philippine Law RA 9147.{{Cite web|last=11th Congress|title=Republic Act No
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

It is illegal to hunt, capture or keep flame-breasted fruit-doves under Philippine Law RA 9147.{{Cite web|last=11th Congress|title=Republic Act No
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Flame-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: The rate of habitat loss in montane forest now much lower and has supposedly slowed down. It is threatened by habitat loss, poaching for the pet trade, nest disturbance and hunting for food
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

relations.subject: Flame-breasted fruit dove
relations.evidence: Habitat loss is its main threat with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
